prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: project-bound RPG world atlas map, portrait orientation
Primary request: D&D 5e / Forgotten Realms inspired heroic high fantasy world map for the terrain type diverse_archipelago.
Scene/backdrop: a vast magical ocean world filled with many island groups and microcontinents, frontier harbor towns, ancient forests, mountain islands, dungeon entrances, ruined castles, wizard tower islands, dragon lairs, enchanted reef belts, pirate coves, sacred groves, jungle isles, desert atolls and volcanic realms.
Style/medium: high-resolution illustrated fantasy atlas, parchment cartography, inked coastlines, hand-painted terrain relief, glowing magical accents, classic heroic adventure campaign mood.
Composition/framing: tall portrait world map with unevenly distributed island clusters; include large islands, tiny islets, crescent island arcs, lagoons, reef belts, narrow straits, remote atolls, fragmented cliffs and microcontinents with no grid-like spacing; include compass rose, decorative border, sea routes, dungeon icons and subtle realm boundaries without readable text.
Geography constraints: islands must vary strongly in size and shape, with realistic complex coastlines, broken shores, curved bays, peninsulas, fjords, deltas, marshy estuaries, volcanic ridges and magical landmarks; show many climates and biomes across the archipelago including snowfields, temperate forests, jungles, wetlands, deserts, plains, volcanic lands and enchanted wastelands.
Avoid: evenly spaced islands, simple round islands, tropical-only palette, modern satellite image, board-game UI, readable labels, watermark, logo, real-world map copy.
